name: DRAW_RECT
comment:
Draws a rectangle on the screen.

-x: The relative X point of the center of the rectangle. (0.0-1.0, 0.0 is the left edge of the screen, 1.0 is the right edge of the screen)

-y: The relative Y point of the center of the rectangle. (0.0-1.0, 0.0 is the top edge of the screen, 1.0 is the bottom edge of the screen)

-width: The relative width of the rectangle. (0.0-1.0, 1.0 means the whole screen width)

-height: The relative height of the rectangle. (0.0-1.0, 1.0 means the whole screen height)

-R: Red part of the color. (0-255)

-G: Green part of the color. (0-255)

-B: Blue part of the color. (0-255)

-A: Alpha part of the color. (0-255, 0 means totally transparent, 255 means totally opaque)
lua:
-- 0x405224591DF02025 · build 1207
local x = 0.0
local y = 0.0
local width = 0.0
local height = 0.0
local red = 0
local green = 0
local blue = 0
local alpha = 0
local p8 = true
local p9 = true
DrawRect(x, y, width, height, red, green, blue, alpha, p8, p9)

name: DRAW_SPRITE
comment:
Draws a 2D sprite on the screen.

Parameters:
textureDict - Name of texture dictionary to load texture from

textureName - Name of texture to load from texture dictionary

screenX/Y - Screen offset (0.5 = center)
scaleX/Y - Texture scaling. Negative values can be used to flip the texture on that axis. (0.5 = half)

heading - Texture rotation in degrees (default = 0.0) positive is clockwise, measured in degrees

red,green,blue - Sprite color (default = 255/255/255)

alpha - opacity level

https://github.com/femga/rdr3_discoveries/tree/master/useful_info_from_rpfs/textures
lua:
-- 0xC9884ECADE94CB34 · build 1207
local textureDict = ""
local textureName = ""
local screenX = 0.0
local screenY = 0.0
local width = 0.0
local height = 0.0
local heading = 0.0
local red = 0
local green = 0
local blue = 0
local alpha = 0
local p11 = true
DrawSprite(textureDict, textureName, screenX, screenY, width, height, heading, red, green, blue, alpha, p11)

name: SET_ARTIFICIAL_LIGHTS_STATE

Does not affect weapons, particles, fire/explosions, flashlights or the sun.
When set to true, all emissive textures (including ped components that have light effects), street lights, building lights, vehicle lights, etc will all be turned off.

state: True turns off all artificial light sources in the map: buildings, street lights, car lights, etc. False turns them back on.

Returns whether the 'killFX' setting is enabled.

ANIMPOSTFX_*

name: _ADD_BLOOD_POOL
comment:
https://i.imgur.com/ULQU9US.jpg
More rounded and small puddle
research: Cree des decalques de sang a partir d'un ped, par intervalles pendant quelques secondes. La taille des decalques varie selon les arguments flottants. *(OCR - a verifier)*
lua:
-- 0xFA2ECC78A6014D4F · build 1207
local x = 0.0
local y = 0.0
local z = 0.0
local unused = true
AddBloodPool(x, y, z, unused)

name: _ADD_BLOOD_POOLS_FOR_PED
comment: Creates blood pools for the given ped in some interval for a few seconds.

name: _ADD_BLOOD_POOLS_FOR_PED_WITH_PARAMS

local p3 = 0.0
